meaning: n.君主,臣民,列日adj.君主的,臣民的,君臣关系的
examples: My back is my bread, O my gracious liege!
Is it not I that speed his death penalty hence, my liege?
Tis matter of small weight, my liege, yet will I touch upon it, an' it please your Grace.
Santos joined Etoile du Sahel in 1998, after a two-season spell with Belgian side Standard Liege.
Arsenal were drawn in Group H alongside Dutch side AZ Alkmaar, Greek side Olympiakos and Belgium's Standard Liege.
